node_summary.purpose: Embedded CSS design system providing complete styling for the art studio website including color palette, typography, layout systems, component styles, animations, and responsive breakpoints.
node_summary.behavior: 1. :root block defines CSS custom properties (design tokens) 2. Universal selector resets margin/padding and sets box-sizing 3. Base styles applied to html (smooth scroll) and body (font, colors) 4. Component-specific styles cascade in document order 5. Keyframe animations defined for fadeUp and float effects 6. Media queries override styles at 1024px and 768px breakpoints 7. Pseudo-elements generate decorative content 8. Transitions provide smooth hover and scroll state changes

key_data_flows.input: Media queries respond to viewport width changes
key_data_flows.output: Final styles applied to DOM elements

side_effects.effect: overflow-x: hidden on body prevents horizontal scrolling
position: fixed on nav removes it from document flow
z-index stacking context established for nav (1000) and shapes (-1)

important_patterns.pattern: :root { --color-cream: #FAF7F2; --color-charcoal: #2C2C2C; --color-gold: #C9A959; ... } Enables consistent theming and easy palette changes
Multiple radial gradients for subtle color backgrounds Linear gradients for decorative accents
transform: translateY(-5px) for lift effect width transitions on underline pseudo-elements scaleX transitions on top border accents
font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem) for fluid responsive headings

components.component: Fixed header with logo and links, scroll-triggered styling
Full-height landing with gradient background and floating shapes
Two-column grid with image frame and content
Centered quote card with sage gradient background
Media query overrides for tablet and mobile

edge_cases.case: backdrop-filter: blur(10px) may not render on older browsers
CSS Grid gap property requires modern browser support
clamp() function not supported in IE11

performance.metric: Low specificity selectors for easy overrides
transform and opacity used for animations (compositor-friendly)
performance.concern: 754 lines of inline CSS increases initial HTML payload
